title: Al-Anbar, Which Is Dhat al-'Uyun, and Kalwadha
description: Al-Sari-Shucayb-Sayf- Muhammad, Talhah, and their companions: Khilid b. al-Walid went forth with that mobilization in which 171. The site of al-Husayn's martyrdom. See EIS, s.v Karbala'. 172. Al-Mujishi`i al-Dirimi, of a noble Tamimi lineage, he is said to have become a Muslim in Medina before the fall of Mecca in 8/630, more likely in the year of delegations, 9/63 i. He is alleged to have been the cause of the revelation of Qur'an 49:4 - 5.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 11
